dialogos.texto_en: Wow...\nIt's bustling here.
This is the main street of Naha.\nIt's listed as a must-see place in the guidebooks.
There are so many shops lined up!\nHow far do they go?
It's supposed to be almost a mile long.\nIf you convert it to kilometers, it's about 1.6 km.
A mile...?
It's a unit of length... You don't know that?
I-I do!\nI just didn't get it right away.
Why did you say it in miles?
Because Kokusai dori is called the 'Miracle Mile.'
Wow, you're really knowledgeable.
No, I just did some research\nbefore we came to Okinawa.
Speaking of which, don't you guys do some research\nbefore going on a trip? You do, right? Anyway, I was too \nexcited and did an extensive deep-dive on Okinawa!
Well, I researched a little bit, you know?\nBut whether I can remember everything I looked up\nis another matter entirely.
Ah, I get it.
Don't give me that disappointed look!
A-anyway, with all these shops lined up,\nit's hard to decide where to go.
Indeed, if we tried to see them all,\neven a whole day might not be enough.
Did you really plan to see them all?\nIf you don't just focus on what catches your eye,\nthere'll be no end to it, you know?
So, where should we start?
Well, how about splitting up for now and visit the places we're\ninterested in?
That sounds good. Okay then%p-2;――
Wait, hold on a moment!
Hm? What's up?
Actually, I have a suggestion%p-2;――
We all get matching souvenirs, huh?\nFor you Fu-kun it's a real thoughtful idea.
I think it's a great idea too!
I definitely agree!\nIt'll definitely be a memory we'll cherish forever.
What kind of souvenir should we get?
Let's search for things in the shops we're interested in.
Ah, you're right.
And we're counting on your sense of style, Futaro-kun.
I'll do my best to meet your expectations...\nbut don't get your hopes up too high. Honestly,\nI don't have much confidence in my sense of style.
Bummer. You're being pessimistic before we even start looking.\nIt's okay, just tell us about anything you think looks good.
Okay, got it.
